schema.title: Response Get Executive Summary V1 Math Cfo Executive Summary Get

post.description:
Get CFO executive summary with what-if projection.

Supports both global-level and tier-level what-if parameters.
When tier params are provided (no_sales, poor, mid, good), calculates
contributions from each performance tier to global metrics.

When forecast_params is provided with any parameters set, returns:
{
    "baseline": <original response>,
    "projected": <response with projected values>,
    "diff": {metric: projected - baseline, ...},
    "percent_diff": {metric: diff / baseline * 100, ...}
}

schema.title: Response Post Executive Summary V1 Math Total Executive Summary Post

ad_sales.title: Ad Sales
ad_sales.description: Total revenue from advertising (currency, e.g., USD)

ad_ctr.title: Ad Ctr
ad_ctr.description: Click-through rate - percentage of impressions that resulted in clicks (%, e.g., 2.5 means 2.5%)

ad_cvr.title: Ad Cvr
ad_cvr.description: Conversion rate - percentage of clicks that resulted in orders (%, e.g., 5.0 means 5%)

ad_orders.title: Ad Orders
ad_orders.description: Total number of orders attributed to ads (count)

ad_units_sold.title: Ad Units Sold
ad_units_sold.description: Total units sold attributed to ads (count)

acos.title: Acos
acos.description: Advertising Cost of Sales - ad spend as percentage of ad sales (%, e.g., 30.0 means 30%)

roas.title: Roas
roas.description: Return on Ad Spend - revenue per dollar spent (ratio, e.g., 3.33 means $3.33 revenue per $1 spent)

cpc.title: Cpc
cpc.description: Cost per Click - average cost for each click (currency, e.g., USD)

cpm.title: Cpm
cpm.description: Cost per Mille - cost per 1000 impressions (currency, e.g., USD)

time_in_budget.title: Time In Budget
time_in_budget.description: Percentage of time ad campaigns ran within budget (%, e.g., 85.0 means 85%)

ad_tos_is.title: Ad Tos Is
ad_tos_is.description: Top of Search Impression Share - percentage of top-of-search impressions won (%, e.g., 25.0 means 25%)

ads_non_optimal_spend.title: Ads Non Optimal Spend
ads_non_optimal_spend.description: Non-optimal ad spend - money spent on targets with no sales or ACOS > 100% (wasted spend, currency, e.g., USD)

ad_sales.title: Ad Sales
ad_sales.description: Total revenue from advertising (currency, e.g., USD)

ad_ctr.title: Ad Ctr
ad_ctr.description: Click-through rate - percentage of impressions that resulted in clicks (%, e.g., 2.5 means 2.5%)

ad_cvr.title: Ad Cvr
ad_cvr.description: Conversion rate - percentage of clicks that resulted in orders (%, e.g., 5.0 means 5%)

roas.title: Roas
roas.description: Return on Ad Spend - revenue per dollar spent (ratio, e.g., 3.33 means $3.33 revenue per $1 spent)

cpc.title: Cpc
cpc.description: Cost per Click - average cost for each click (currency, e.g., USD)

cpm.title: Cpm
cpm.description: Cost per Mille - cost per 1000 impressions (currency, e.g., USD)

time_in_budget.title: Time In Budget
time_in_budget.description: Percentage of time ad campaigns ran within budget (%, e.g., 85.0 means 85%)

ad_tos_is.title: Ad Tos Is
ad_tos_is.description: Top of Search Impression Share - percentage of top-of-search impressions won (%, e.g., 25.0 means 25%)

ads_non_optimal_spend.title: Ads Non Optimal Spend
ads_non_optimal_spend.description: Non-optimal ad spend - money spent on targets with no sales or ACOS > 100% (wasted spend, currency, e.g., USD)

AdsExecutiveSummaryWithForecastBreakdown.title: AdsExecutiveSummaryWithForecastBreakdown
AdsExecutiveSummaryWithForecastBreakdown.description:
Schema for ads executive summary with forecast breakdown.

Used when future dates are requested without timespan parameter.
Contains the combined totals at the top level, plus nested 'real' and 'forecasted'
portions showing the breakdown between historical and forecasted values.

attribution_acos.title: Attribution Acos
attribution_acos.description: Attribution advertising cost of sales (%, e.g., 25.0 means 25%)

attribution_acos.title: Attribution Acos
attribution_acos.description: Attribution advertising cost of sales (%, e.g., 25.0 means 25%)

AttributionExecutiveSummaryWithForecastB.description:

Used when future dates are requested without timespan parameter.
Contains the combined totals at the top level, plus nested 'real' and 'forecasted'
portions showing the breakdown between historical and forecasted values.

available_capital.title: Available Capital
available_capital.description: Available capital for purchasing goods and paying expenses

frozen_capital.title: Frozen Capital
frozen_capital.description: Sum of all inventory and goods in transit

borrowed_capital.title: Borrowed Capital
borrowed_capital.description: Sum of all inventory purchased with borrowed money

ForecastParams.title: ForecastParams
ForecastParams.description:
What-if simulation parameters for parameterized forecasting.

Pass this as a JSON body to any metric endpoint to get projected values
based on learned correlations between metrics.

Parameters accept PERCENTAGE CHANGES, not absolute values:
- Positive values increase the metric (e.g., 10 = +10%)
- Negative values decrease the metric (e.g., -50 = -50%)
- Range: -100 (reduce to zero) to infinity (no upper limit)

Example request body:
{
    "ad_spend_what_if": 10,       // Increase ad spend by 10%
    "net_profit_what_if": -20     // Decrease net profit by 20%
}

The endpoint will return both actual values and projected (forecast) values
showing how metrics would change with these percentage adjustments applied.

The model learns correlations from historical data - no hardcoded relationships.

StrategicPlanResponse.title: StrategicPlanResponse
StrategicPlanResponse.description:
Response model for the strategic plan endpoint.

Generates a forward-looking strategic plan for 3-6 months using forecasted data
and what-if projections based on goals.

Contains both current path projections and optimal path projections (with whatif),
along with percent differences showing potential improvement.
